data.body: PREPLANNING_CONTEXT_LIGHTWEIGHT: {"version":1,"epicId":"a171-6c65","generatedAt":"2026-04-11T00:00:00Z","generatedBy":"preplanning","epic":{"title":"Close residual-state blind spot in brainstorm and preplanning review pipeline","description":"When an epic involves moving/deprecating/renaming file paths, the planning pipeline fails to detect stale references. Adds residual-state probe to Part B, expanded trigger to Part C, escalate_to_epic finding type to red/blue team, and scenario-driven SC revision to brainstorm.","successCriteria":["Part B residual state probe with codebase grep","Part C trigger on move/deprecate/remove/rename","Red team Residual References category + escalate_to_epic + blue team update","Scenario-driven SC revision with mandatory re-approval","Behavioral test with RED baseline","Replan cascade bounded by sprint.max_replan_cycles"]},"stories":[],"storyDashboard":{"totalStories":0,"uiStories":0,"criticalPath":[]}}
